description: You are an Agricultural Engineer for Urban Greens, an AgTech startup. Transform the open building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a controlled-environment agriculture (CEA) facility featuring four named rooms: a Vestibule/Gowning Room, a Main Grow Room, a Nutrient/Utility Room, and a Harvesting & Packaging Area. The design must incorporate at least three interior partition walls and three doors to enclose the biosecurity and utility zones. Furnish the facility using the built-in catalog with at least 15 shelving units in the Grow Room, 2 cabinets in the Vestibule, 3 workbenches in the Packaging Area, and 2 utility fixtures in the Nutrient Room. Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two rooms to differentiate clean zones from utility areas. Save the completed project.
